_comment: Hardware/IT store configs for precio-real scraper. Issue #51.
_tested: 2026-05-12 — each domain verified via curl + DNS lookup (Google DNS 8.8.8.8)

retailers.name: Compumundo
retailers.notes: WordPress blog (Cube Blog theme, wp.com stats). No ecommerce functionality — site publishes tech articles/reviews only. No product catalog, no cart, no prices. Not scrapable for pricing. Skip.

retailers.name: MicroCenter
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). No web presence found. Skip.

retailers.name: Alphatec
retailers.notes: Empretienda platform (esmsv.com CDN, Laravel Livewire). Has cart and product catalog at /catalogo. Category structure is flat (single /catalogo page). Products loaded via Livewire AJAX. Limited product variety — small store. Requires Livewire wire:snapshot parsing or browser automation.

retailers.name: Bit.ar
retailers.notes: Domain returns 200 but is a parked/SEO page about 'bit technology' and 'cryptocurrency'. Title mentions 'Comprar Dominios Web Argentina'. Not a real tech store — domain is parked with generic SEO content. Skip.

retailers.name: DigitalHaus
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). No web presence found. Skip.

retailers.name: Binario
retailers.notes: IT consulting company landing page (Bootstrap 3, single-page). Sections: Nosotros, Servicios, Clientes, Contacto. No ecommerce, no products, no prices. 'Especialistas en consultoria y soluciones tecnologicas.' Not a retail store. Skip.

retailers.name: CompuPC
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). No web presence found. Skip.

retailers.name: Autronic
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). No web presence found. Skip.

retailers.name: CenturyTech
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). No web presence found. Skip.

retailers.name: PCarg
retailers.notes: Domain is for sale on GoDaddy (redirects to forsale.godaddy.com/forsale/pcarg.com). Returns 405 on HEAD, lander page shows 'Access Denied' via Akamai. Not a functional store. Skip.

retailers.name: Megatrix
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). No web presence found. Skip.

retailers.name: Netizar
retailers.notes: DNS resolves to 18.213.50.227 (AWS) but connection times out on port 443 and port 80 returns no response. Server is unreachable. Skip.

retailers.name: Lazer
retailers.notes: DNS resolves to 205.178.146.236 (openresty/1.27.1.2). TLS certificate verification fails (exit code 60) — insecure connection returns 500 Internal Server Error with empty body. Server is broken. Skip.
